criteria.label: Sales Experience
criteria.description: At least 1 year as an Account Executive OR at least 3 years as a BDR/SDR. SaaS experience preferred.

criteria.label: Startup Experience
criteria.description: At least one employer was a startup or company with under 200 employees. Ideally 10–100 employees.

criteria.label: Education
criteria.description: Note whether they have a bachelor's degree and when they graduated.

criteria.label: Quota Attainment
criteria.description: Resume explicitly mentions exceeding quota (e.g. 130% of quota, exceeded targets, #1 rep, etc.)

criteria.label: Employment Recency
criteria.description: Currently employed OR most recent role ended within 2 months. If end date is year-only, treat as December of that year.

criteria.label: Engineering Experience
criteria.description: 7+ years of full stack engineering experience. SaaS experience preferred.

criteria.label: Startup Experience
criteria.description: At least one employer was a startup or company with under 200 employees. Ideally 10–100 employees.

criteria.label: Education
criteria.description: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IMS, Applied Math, or related CS field. Graduated 2018 or earlier.

criteria.label: Python
criteria.description: Python must explicitly appear on the resume as a language they have used.

criteria.label: Employment Recency
criteria.description: Currently employed OR most recent role ended within 2 months. If end date is year-only, treat as December of that year.

bonusSignals: AI product or AI SaaS company experience
Voice AI or speech tech experience
